'''1''' was an [[XQ3 Platform]] used by [[Viraxo Industries]]. This station stored a large quantity of [[Warhead/Legends|warheads]] and [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsors]].

==History==
The warheads were scheduled to be delivered to a [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] [[Bulk cruiser/Legends|Bulk cruiser]], the ''[[XTS-673]]'', which was escorted by [[Supa Fighter]]s. However, [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] and his [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[MK-09/Legends|MK-09]] in the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] ''[[Sabra]]'', along with the [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] of [[Magnum Group]], raided the platform to steal the warheads for the Rebel Alliance, who were suffering from a shortage of [[Missile/Legends|missiles]].<ref name="XWING" />

Azzameen destroyed it along with the defenses and security [[Razor-class starfighter|Razor Fighters]], and identified the warheads from the [[Class-A cargo container|Containers]] ''[[CV]]''. Then [[container transport]] group ''Magnum'' arrived and stole the warheads so that they could give them to [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90]] group [[Ithor (corvette group)|Ithor]].<ref name="XWING" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
